EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} created the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} modified the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to create a Pod security policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is creating the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is modifying the Pod security policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about Pod security policies on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to modify a Pod security policy on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
